commands.payload:
IntuneAppBuilder.Console

Usage:
  IntuneAppBuilder.Console [options] [command]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  pack
  publish

result.stdout:
pack

Usage:
  IntuneAppBuilder.Console [options] pack

Options:
  sources, -s, --source <source> (REQUIRED)  Specifies a source to package. May be a directory with files for a Win32 app or a single msi file. May be specified multiple times.
  -o, --output <output>                      Specifies an output directory for packaging artifacts. Each packaged application will exist as a raw intunewin file, a portal-ready portal.intunewin file, and an intunewin.json file containing metadata. Defaults to the working directory. [default: .]
  -?, -h, --help                             Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
pack

Usage:
  IntuneAppBuilder.Console [options] pack

Options:
  sources, -s, --source <source> (REQUIRED)  Specifies a source to package. May be a directory with files for a Win32 app or a single msi file. May be specified multiple times.
  -o, --output <output>                      Specifies an output directory for packaging artifacts. Each packaged application will exist as a raw intunewin file, a portal-ready portal.intunewin file, and an intunewin.json file containing metadata. Defaults to the working directory. [default: .]
  -?, -h, --help                             Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
publish

Usage:
  IntuneAppBuilder.Console [options] publish

Options:
  sources, -s, --source <source> (REQUIRED)  Specifies a source to publish. May be a directory with *.intunewin.json files or a single json file
  token, -t <token>                          Specifies an access token to use when publishing.
  -?, -h, --help                             Show help and usage information

  token, -t <token>                          Specifies an access token to use when publishing.
  -?, -h, --help                             Show help and usage information
